search_query: what is a person who makes music called
combined_text: musician "musician [myoo- zish - uh n]Spell Syllables Examples Word Origin See more synonyms on Thesaurus.comnoun1. a person who makes music a profession, especially as a performer of music.2. any person, whether professional or not, skilled in music.
